overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a medieval European town at night. The character moves from a covered brick corridor through cobblestone streets illuminated by lanterns and fire pits, passing timber-framed buildings, a watchtower, and other NPCs in a dark fantasy atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered brick corridor leading to town archway

events.description: character exits covered corridor through large stone archway into open town

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily through the covered corridor toward the illuminated archway exit

entered.detail: enclosed walkway with brick walls and wooden ceiling beams
large medieval stone archway marking the exit from the covered area
lit lanterns suspended from ceiling providing warm orange light
simple wooden bench against the corridor wall

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a covered brick corridor with hanging lanterns casting warm light on cobblestone floors. Geralt walks forward toward a large stone archway that frames the night sky and distant town buildings, transitioning from the enclosed shelter to the open medieval street.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval town street with timber-framed houses

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through the town street, observing the surroundings and passing between buildings

entered.detail: traditional half-timbered building with dark wooden beams and plaster walls
solid stone structure with small windows on the right side of the street
warm yellow light glowing from windows of the timber house
burning fire pit in the middle of the street providing light

segments.scene_description: Having exited the covered corridor, Geralt walks along an open cobblestone street lined with timber-framed houses and stone buildings. Warm light emanates from windows and street braziers, illuminating the misty night air as the character moves deeper into the medieval town.

scene_state.functional_zone: town square with watchtower and scattered debris

events.description: passing a corpse lying on the ground to the right

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through the town square, passing a body on the ground and approaching a round tower structure

notable_agents.action: distant figure walking away from the camera down the street

entered.detail: cylindrical stone tower with conical roof and small windows
stone steps leading up alongside the tower
body lying on the cobblestones near the building wall
construction scaffolding against the building facade

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wider town square featuring a prominent round stone watchtower with an attached staircase. Geralt passes a corpse lying on the ground near wooden scaffolding while a distant NPC walks ahead. The area is lit by fire pits and lanterns, with the tower dominating the right side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: sloped street with retaining walls and overhead bridge

events.description: villager NPC steps aside to let Geralt pass on the narrow path

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking up a slight incline, passing close by a villager who moves out of the way

notable_agents.action: villager walking toward camera then stepping aside to the right

entered.detail: tall stone wall supporting the elevated ground to the left
stone bridge structure crossing over the street ahead

segments.scene_description: Geralt ascends a sloped cobblestone street bordered by a high stone retaining wall on the left and stairs on the right. An overhead bridge spans the street ahead. A villager approaches from the opposite direction and steps aside to let Geralt pass near a burning brazier.

events.description: entering the narrow stone underpass beneath the bridge
exiting the underpass back into open street

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through the narrow tunnel under the bridge, emerging back into the town streets

entered.detail: confined passageway with brick walls and low ceiling under the bridge
sconces mounted on the tunnel walls providing dim illumination
stacked barrels against the tunnel wall

segments.scene_description: The segment transitions into a narrow, enclosed stone tunnel beneath the overhead bridge. Wall-mounted lanterns cast flickering shadows on the brickwork as Geralt passes wooden barrels. The character emerges from the underpass at the end, returning to the open town street with buildings visible ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a medieval town at night, transitioning from an enclosed brick corridor into open cobblestone streets and back into a narrow stone underpass. It begins within a covered walkway lit by hanging lanterns, moving forward through a large stone archway that opens the scene into a misty street lined with timber-framed houses and glowing braziers. The path then expands into a wider town square dominated by a round stone watchtower and wooden scaffolding, where the camera passes a fallen corpse and a distant pedestrian. As the character ascends a sloped street bordered by a high retaining wall, the view shifts toward an overhead bridge and a passing villager before turning into the shadows of a narrow stone tunnel. The sequence finally concludes as the camera emerges from the flickering light of the underpass, returning to the open air of the town street.
